channel.title: Hello, Grace! on hexagonally.mired
channel.description: Recent content in Hello, Grace! on hexagonally.mired

item.title: March 13, 2026
item.description:
It’s been six years now, since life froze for the greatest propagandist empire ever. Following the first case in a senior center in Kent, WA, the machine froze fast, and we saw our carbon output slow down for just a little.

Today, six years, later, I Wake up to the rhythm of the city and I try to remember, even my best friends have some trouble with each other, sometimes things fall apart.

item.title: March 12, 2026
item.description:
Music Recs!!!

Morgan Nagler

if you’ve got nothing to listen to on your way back, and the time is past 9p, I think you’ll be able to listen to Morgan Nagler’s ‘I’ve Got Nothing To Lose, and I’m Losing It’ the full album releases at midnight Eastern Daylight, and (at least on spotify) it drops at 2100.

She co-wrote Phoebe Bridgers’ Kyoto, and the songs from the album she’s already dropped are super fun

item.title: February 21, 2026:
item.description:
My view from the end of a warped tunnel.

I sit

I sit at the end of a warped tunnel, in fact!

I’ve primed myself for the dim that comes

when someone sends me sights

which have touched their soul

In the dim darkness,

I become a furnace,

Cold and still nervous

Because without the broken camera of another soul

I’ve become poised to be lost in my own fishbowl

item.title: Inital Hello!
item.description:
Hi, Grace!

Um yeah that’s it

I have so much to say, but it’s all locked in my head in a different language.

Instead, you get an image

item.title: Thing
item.description: Here’s another cool picture I took

item.title: February 20, 2026
item.description:
Hey, Grace; Could you tell that the smile in that picture I sent you that one time is actually RED?? I had no idea until I went there again a few weeks later :o

Here’s the picture for reference:

Here’s another cool picture I took:
